title: Infosys Receives INR 7,49,10,389 Penalty Demand From Deputy Commissioner of Commercial Taxes
detailed_summary: Infosys disclosed that it received communication for collection of a penalty from the Deputy Commissioner of Commercial taxes. The total penalty is INR 7,49,10,389/-. The demand relates to alleged non-realization or delay in realization of export proceeds, availment of ineligible ITC, and other issues including RCM, import of services, sale of investments, staff welfare expense, and write-off cases of exports for FY 2021-22. Infosys stated that there is no material impact on its financials, operations, or other activities.
